title: ibatia fontana
intro: Ibatia fontana, also known as the 'Coral Root', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, Ibatia fontana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off free radicals. Herbal preparations of Ibatia fontana typically involve drying and grinding the root, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or added to other herbal remedies.
